## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a recording to help explain the problem.

## Device & Browser

- Device: (e.g. iPhone 14, Pixel 7, Desktop)
- OS: (e.g. iOS 17, Android 14, Windows 11)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
